# v1.0.0 — Initial Release / 首次发布

**Languages:** English · 中文

---

## English

First public release of **round-harness** — a portable Agent Skill to scaffold standard AI collaboration harness in any repository.

### Highlights

- **`agent-harness` Skill** — `init_harness.py` generates `harness/`, `AGENTS.md`, gate scripts, and full todo/PROGRESS/DECISIONS workflow
- **Multi-tool support** — Cursor, Codex, Claude Code, universal `~/.agents/skills/`, and [Skills CLI](https://skills.sh/)
- **Bilingual docs** — English + 中文 (README, docs/, CONTRIBUTING)
- **CI** — scaffold validation on Python 3.10 & 3.12

### Install

```bash
npx skills add HYX-LHJ/round-harness --skill agent-harness -g -y
```

Or clone: https://github.com/HYX-LHJ/round-harness

### Docs

- [Getting started](https://github.com/HYX-LHJ/round-harness/blob/main/docs/getting-started.md)
- [Installation (multi-tool)](https://github.com/HYX-LHJ/round-harness/blob/main/docs/installation.md)
- [Skills CLI guide](https://github.com/HYX-LHJ/round-harness/blob/main/docs/skills-cli.md)

---

## 中文

**round-harness** 首次公开发布 — 可在任意仓库一键搭建标准化 AI Agent 协作工程。

### 亮点

- **`agent-harness` Skill** — `init_harness.py` 生成 `harness/`、`AGENTS.md`、门禁脚本及完整协作流程
- **多工具支持** — Cursor、Codex、Claude Code、通用 `~/.agents/skills/`、[Skills CLI](https://skills.sh/)
- **中英双语文档**
- **CI** — Python 3.10 / 3.12 脚手架验证

### 安装

```bash
npx skills add HYX-LHJ/round-harness --skill agent-harness -g -y
```

或克隆：https://github.com/HYX-LHJ/round-harness

### 文档

- [快速入门](https://github.com/HYX-LHJ/round-harness/blob/main/docs/getting-started.md)
- [多工具安装](https://github.com/HYX-LHJ/round-harness/blob/main/docs/installation.md)
- [Skills CLI 指南](https://github.com/HYX-LHJ/round-harness/blob/main/docs/skills-cli.md)
